items.title: VIP financial provider data can be normalized into current sync inputs
items.description: The Tushare provider resolves a recent financial report period and maps fina_indicator_vip/income_vip/balancesheet_vip/cashflow_vip into normalized fundamental overrides.

items.title: Analysis sync materializes a canonical financial sidecar table
items.description: The analysis and sync path materializes fundamental_feature_daily with snapshot-bound financial metrics and scores.

items.title: Screener consumes canonical financial scores when available
items.description: The screener joins fundamental_feature_daily and prefers canonical financial scores while preserving heuristic fallback when no financial sidecar exists.

items.title: Harness and docs stay healthy after the financial-sidecar expansion
items.description: The new financial sidecar work updates repository docs and does not break the existing harness checks.
